name: EmailMessage
concept: Transactional or bulk email delivery record with gateway lifecycle tracking
observed_fields: SmsLogId (long? in C# — INT NULL in DB — type discrepancy observed; FK to SmsLog for cross-channel broadcast tracking)
ExternalRefId (long? in C# — INT NULL in DB — type discrepancy observed)
XmessageId (string — SendGrid-assigned message ID, VARCHAR(36) in DB)
ResponseHeaders (string — HTTP response from SendGrid API, VARCHAR(1000) in DB)
DateCreatedUtc (DateTime, DB-managed DEFAULT getutcdate() — NOT in C# entity, DB-only column)
ResponseBody (string, VARCHAR(10) in DB — NOT in C# entity, DB-only column)

normalized_interpretation.DeliveryStatus: Derived from Status enum (20+ states including retries) → simplified: Pending/Sent/Delivered/Failed/Opened
normalized_interpretation.GatewayMetadata: XmessageId + ResponseHeaders → single GatewayResponse value object

rethink.observed: Importing, Queued, SendingToGateway, SentToGateway, QueuedFirstRetry, SendingToGatewayFirstRetry, QueuedSecondRetry, SendingToGatewaySecondRetry, SentToGatewayFailed, SentToGatewaySandbox, Delivered, Opened, Deleted, SendingToGatewayFailed
rethink.proposal: 5 core states: Pending, Sent, Delivered, Failed, Opened (retry logic in metadata, not status)
DeliveryLog owns both email + SMS records (no cross-FK)

name: EmailAttachment
concept: Email attachment stored as owned binary data
observed_fields: DateCreatedUtc (DateTime, DB-managed DEFAULT getutcdate() — NOT in C# entity, DB-only column)

normalized_interpretation.Storage: Inline binary in DB → Blob storage with URI
normalized_interpretation.Relationship: Separate table with FK → Owned collection in EmailMessage

rethink.proposal: Azure Blob Storage with URI + ContentHash for deduplication
Owned entity collection (EF Core) or JSON column

name: EmailTemplate
concept: Localized email template with merge field support and master template wrapping
observed_fields: Html (string — template HTML with $$MAIN_CONTENT$$ or {{field}} placeholders)
DateCreatedUtc (DateTime, DB-managed DEFAULT getutcdate() — NOT in C# entity, DB-only column)

normalized_interpretation.MasterTemplate: Separate wrapping logic → Layout inheritance pattern
normalized_interpretation.Localization: LanguageId FK → CultureInfo enum + resource files

rethink.observed: GetTemplateByNameEnum() injects template into MasterTemplate HTML via string replace

rethink.problem: UseHtmlFromDb nullable bool controls template override
rethink.observed: Unclear when DB template overrides embedded resource

name: Email2SmsWhitelistEntry
concept: Authorized sender for email-to-SMS gateway feature per profile

normalized_interpretation.Scope: Per-profile → Per-tenant with profile-level feature flags

rethink.observed: Email2SmsWhitelistEntry table with ProfileId + Email columns
rethink.proposal: Generic AuthorizationPolicy table with FeatureType enum + ResourceValue JSON
Unique constraint on (ProfileId, Email) enforced at DB level

name: ProcessedInboundEmail
concept: Deduplication record for inbound emails processed via SendGrid webhook — prevents duplicate SMS sends on repeated webhook delivery
observed_fields: MessageId (string — email Message-Id header value, NVARCHAR(500))
Recipient (string — recipient address in phone@email2sms.nu format, NVARCHAR(255))
MessageIdHash (binary(32) — SHA2_256(upper(MessageId)), DB-computed persisted column, NOT in C# entity)
RecipientHash (binary(32) — SHA2_256(upper(Recipient)), DB-computed persisted column, NOT in C# entity)
ProcessedUtc (DateTime2 — timestamp when webhook was processed)
ProfileId (int, FK → Profiles — no CASCADE on delete)
db_pk: Composite: (MessageIdHash ASC, RecipientHash ASC) — NOT identity-based, no surrogate Id column in DB
observations: C# entity inherits BaseEntity (which has int Id) but DB table has NO Id column — composite PK only
Hash columns are DB-computed PERSISTED columns — not writable from application code
No FK CASCADE — orphan records possible if Profile deleted

name: BlockedTemporaryEmailAddressDomain
concept: Blocklist/allowlist entry for temporary (disposable) email address domains
observed_fields: Domain (string — domain portion of email address, NVARCHAR(255))
DateTimeCreatedUtc (DateTime — C# property name; DB column name: DatetimeCreatedUtc — casing discrepancy observed)
Source (string — origin of the entry e.g. import file name, NVARCHAR(255))
Allowed (bool in C# — TINYINT DEFAULT 0 in DB: 0=blocked, non-zero=explicitly allowed)
db_discrepancy: DB column 'DatetimeCreatedUtc' (lowercase 't') vs C# property 'DateTimeCreatedUtc' (uppercase 'T') — EF mapping required
observations: Does NOT inherit BaseEntity — has manual int Id property
Allowed flag dual-purpose: false=blocked domain, true=allowlist override for exception domains
No FK to Customer or Profile — global system-wide blocklist

name: TemplateEmail
concept: Static pre-composed email content fragment with subject, body, and optional standard receiver text
observations: Distinct from EmailTemplate: TemplateEmail holds static pre-written content; EmailTemplate holds dynamic merge-field HTML templates
No FK to Customer, Profile, or Language — appears system-global
Relationship to EmailMessage or EmailTemplate not determinable from entity alone — requires behavior extraction
